case_name: Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb shipping disruption (Houthi attacks)
source_notes: Directionally based on public reporting of Houthi attacks on Red Sea shipping starting November 2023 and the resulting Cape of Good Hope rerouting by many carriers; the specific delay/cost/price figures above are illustrative and simulated for this prototype, not sourced from a single verified dataset.

case_name: Strait of Hormuz tanker incidents and seizures
source_notes: Directionally based on public reporting of tanker attacks near Fujairah and the Gulf of Oman and subsequent tanker seizures in 2019; no full Hormuz closure occurred and outcome figures here are illustrative/simulated for this prototype's calibration purposes, not audited historical statistics.

case_name: Post-invasion reroute of India's crude sourcing toward discounted Russian barrels
source_notes: Directionally based on the widely reported shift of India's crude import mix toward discounted Russian Urals following Western sanctions after February 2022; exact tanker/route/cost figures are simulated and illustrative for this prototype, not drawn from a single audited source.
